subject: A robed figure consumed by a swirling vortex of dark energy as a glowing spark of essence is violently ripped from their body
description: A dark, vertical composition dominated by a void-like black background. A robed humanoid figure is centered, body arched and contorted as if being torn apart from within. A brilliant purple-white spark of energy is being extracted from the figure's chest or core, surrounded by chaotic ribbons and tendrils of dark violet and electric blue magical energy that swirl outward in a vortex pattern. The figure's silhouette is partially obscured by the maelstrom of arcane force. Highlights of cool blue-white light rim the figure and the energy streams, contrasting sharply against the deep black and purple shadows. The mood is grim, sacrificial, and violent — a soul or essence being harvested.
foreground: robed figure with spark being torn from body, surrounded by swirling magical energy
background: void-like black space with dark purple energy tendrils
emotion: agony, violent extraction, contorted body language reading as torment
